mapper.sql: rei.re_id as rri_id, rei.school, rei.education, rei.enrollment_time, rei.graduation_time, rei.new_education_flag, rei.specialized_subject, rei.enrollment, rei.attribute1, rei.attribute2, rei.attribute3, rei.enabled_flag, rei.id, rei.create_by, rei.update_time, rei.update_by, rei.create_time

${tAlias}.re_id as ${tAlias}_rri_id, ${tAlias}.school as ${tAlias}_school, ${tAlias}.education as ${tAlias}_education, ${tAlias}.enrollment_time as ${tAlias}_enrollment_time, ${tAlias}.graduation_time as ${tAlias}_graduation_time, ${tAlias}.new_education_flag as ${tAlias}_new_education_flag, ${tAlias}.specialized_subject as ${tAlias}_specialized_subject, ${tAlias}.enrollment as ${tAlias}_enrollment, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time
mapper.insert: insert into re_education_interface (re_id, school, education, enrollment_time, graduation_time, new_education_flag, specialized_subject, enrollment, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, create_by, update_time, update_by, create_time) values (#{recruitmentInterface.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{school,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{education,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enrollmentTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{graduationTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{newEducationFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{specializedSubject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enrollment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update re_education_interface set re_id = #{recruitmentInterface.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, school = #{school,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, education = #{education,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enrollment_time = #{enrollmentTime,jdbcType=DATE}, graduation_time = #{graduationTime,jdbcType=DATE}, new_education_flag = #{newEducationFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, specialized_subject = #{specializedSubject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enrollment = #{enrollment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
